content.content:
PASS .tmp/coupons/coupon-service.test.ts
  CouponService.applyCoupon
    ✓ AC1: valid SAVE10 applies 10% off — cartTotal * 0.90 (1 ms)
    ✓ AC2: expired coupon throws CouponError with code COUPON_EXPIRED (3 ms)
    ✓ AC3: unknown coupon code throws CouponError with code COUPON_NOT_FOUND
    ✓ AC4: cartTotal $40 below minimumOrder $50 throws CouponError with code ORDER_MINIMUM_NOT_MET
    ✓ AC5: single-use coupon already used throws CouponError with code COUPON_ALREADY_USED (1 ms)
    ✓ AC1 (fractional): SAVE10 on $55.50 → $49.95
    ✓ AC4 (boundary): cartTotal exactly at minimumOrder ($50) should succeed and apply discount
    ✓ AC5 (inverse): single-use coupon not yet used succeeds
    ✓ non-single-use coupon with used=true still applies (used flag only matters for singleUse coupons)

Test Suites: 1 passed, 1 total
Tests:       9 passed, 9 total
Snapshots:   0 total
Time:        0.458 s, estimated 1 s
Ran all test suites matching /.tmp\/coupons/i.
